Hacker News Confidence

Less annoying hacker news. (What is this?)

This site scrapes Hacker News once every 30 minutes, then sorts according to this formula, with upvotes as positive signals and comments as negative ones. In my experience, the best articles to read on HN are the ones with a high upvote-to-discussion ratio. Mostly because controversial pieces tend to produce a disproportionate number of comments compared to upvotes.


  1. Microscopes can see video on a laserdisc 205 upvotes, 15 comments
  2. Artificial-life: A simple (300 lines of code) reproduction of Computational Life 54 upvotes, 4 comments
  3. PCB devboard the size of a USB-C plug 36 upvotes, 2 comments
  4. FrameBook 346 upvotes, 62 comments
  5. LibreOffice Writer now supports Markdown 271 upvotes, 49 comments
  6. Z80 Sans – a disassembler in a font (2024) 75 upvotes, 10 comments
  7. Agent Safehouse – macOS-native sandboxing for local agents 276 upvotes, 61 comments
  8. An Analysis of User-Space Idle State Instructions on x86 Processors 18 upvotes, 1 comments
  9. Pushing and Pulling: Three reactivity algorithms 56 upvotes, 10 comments
  10. What if the Apple ][ had run on Field-Sequential? 77 upvotes, 16 comments
  11. Every single board computer I tested in 2025 99 upvotes, 27 comments
  12. Lil Finder Guy 72 upvotes, 21 comments
  13. I made a programming language with M&Ms 41 upvotes, 10 comments
  14. Linux Internals: How /proc/self/mem writes to unwritable memory (2021) 17 upvotes, 3 comments
  15. Notes on writing Rust-based Wasm 197 upvotes, 88 comments
  16. Show HN: I built a real-time OSINT dashboard pulling 15 live global feeds 158 upvotes, 79 comments
  17. Blacksky AppView 81 upvotes, 38 comments
  18. We should revisit literate programming in the agent era 111 upvotes, 56 comments
  19. SQG (SQL to Code Generator) v0.10: Java Streams and List Type Support 14 upvotes, 3 comments
  20. Log messages are mostly for the people operating your software 106 upvotes, 54 comments
  21. Ask HN: Please restrict new accounts from posting 436 upvotes, 317 comments
  22. WSL Manager 64 upvotes, 37 comments
  23. Why can't you tune your guitar? (2019) 170 upvotes, 126 comments
  24. Ask HN: How to be alone? 251 upvotes, 199 comments
  25. My Homelab Setup 135 upvotes, 113 comments
  26. Most of the US economy is in a recession 145 upvotes, 124 comments
  27. Living human brain cells play DOOM on a CL1 [video] 137 upvotes, 117 comments
  28. My “grand vision” for Rust 113 upvotes, 102 comments
  29. The legendary Mojave Phone Booth is back (2013) 5 upvotes, 1 comments
  30. Ask HN: What Are You Working On? (March 2026) 19 upvotes, 20 comments

Last generated 9:00am, 9 March 2026. Source here.
